title: Zoom Integration - Monday.com Commercial
excerpt:
I’m a bit confused. In MDC’s commercial, it shows that zoom will be built into the system instead of having two different windows open. Welcome to Monday.com 
I don’t see that available in my account. Am I supposed to be…

posts.author: Adrian (Adrian F. Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m a bit confused. In MDC’s commercial, it shows that zoom will be built into the system instead of having two different windows open. Welcome to Monday.com
I don’t see that available in my account. Am I supposed to be using a different browser other than google chrome?

posts.author: ErickE-monday.com (Erick E.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Adrian ,

You may be referring to the Embedded Zoom App - this is still under development so it is not available just yet. While we do not have an exact timeline, keep posted as it may be in the near future
